hero.label: Web Development & Digital Marketing
hero.title: Your business deserves a digital presence that sells.
hero.subtitle: We build strategic websites and digital marketing campaigns that turn visitors into customers. Technology + strategy under one roof.

about.label: About me
about.title: Marketing + Code
about.subtitle: The combination your business needs.
about.bio1: Hi, I'm Lolina — a Junior Full Stack Developer with over 11 years of experience in digital marketing. I combine my technical knowledge in frontend and backend with a solid foundation in business strategy, allowing me to create digital products that not only work well, but are designed to sell, rank, and grow.
about.bio2: I primarily work with startups, entrepreneurs, and small businesses looking to take the next step in their digital presence. If you have a project in mind, I'd love to hear about it.
about.quote: I understand both code and strategy. Every pixel has a purpose, every campaign has a measurable goal.
about.diff1_desc: Every project is oriented toward real metrics: more sales, more clients, more visibility.
about.diff2_desc: I work closely with you to understand your business and create tailored solutions.
about.diff3_desc: Web + Marketing under one roof. No need to coordinate multiple providers.
about.diff4_desc: Based in Mérida, Yucatán. I know the local market and its opportunities.
about.cta_label: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it.

services.label: What I do
services.title: Digital solutions that drive real results.
services.desc: Every project is designed to connect with your audience and grow your business in a measurable way.
services.page_desc: Click on any service to see full details, what's included, and real portfolio examples.
services.bottom_cta: Not sure which service you need? Let's talk and I'll help you figure it out.
services.ideal_title: Is this service right for you?
services.portfolio_desc: See what I've achieved for other clients.
services.portfolio_detail: Every project in my portfolio is a real case with clear objectives, process, and concrete results.
services.next_step: Ready to take the next step?

process.label: How we work
process.title: A clear process, no surprises.
process.desc: Every project follows a proven methodology to ensure predictable results and on-time delivery.
process.step1_desc: We schedule a meeting to understand your business, goals, and challenges. No commitment, just clarity.
process.step2_desc: I prepare a clear proposal with stages, deliverables, and budget. Everything in writing, no surprises.
process.step3_desc: We implement the plan with constant communication. You review and approve at every stage.
process.step4_desc: We analyze results and adjust the strategy to maximize your return on investment.
process.cta_text: Ready to start? Take the first step today.
process.faq_title: How does working with me work?
process.faq1_q: How long does a project take?
process.faq1_a: It depends on scope. A landing page can be ready in 1–2 weeks; a full site in 3–6 weeks. We define this in the proposal.
process.faq2_q: How do you keep me updated?
process.faq2_a: We work in stages with reviews. At each phase you receive progress to approve before moving forward. No code delivered all at once.
process.faq3_q: What do I need to get started?
process.faq3_a: Just a conversation. You don't need to have everything figured out. In the initial meeting we organize ideas and define next steps together.
process.faq4_q: What happens after the project is delivered?
process.faq4_a: I provide post-launch support and can continue with maintenance or campaigns as needed. I don't disappear after delivery.
process.final_cta_text: Ready to start? The first step is a conversation.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title_home: Ready to take your business to the next level?
contact.subtitle_home: The first meeting is free. We schedule a 30 to 45-minute call to understand your needs and prepare a custom quote for your project.
contact.desc_page: Book a 30 to 45-minute call to tell me about your project. No commitments — just a conversation to see how I can help.
contact.step1_desc: Choose the day and time that works best for you. The process is quick and easy.
contact.step2_desc: In a 30 to 45-minute call, you share your needs, goals, and what you want to achieve.
contact.step3_desc: Based on our conversation, I prepare a personalized proposal with the services you actually need.
contact.faq1_q: How long is the first call?
contact.faq1_a: Between 30 and 45 minutes. Enough time to get to know each other, understand your project, and answer your questions without pressure.
contact.faq2_a: No. The first consultation is completely free and with no commitment. My goal is to understand if I can help you before talking numbers.
contact.faq3_a: By video call or phone, whichever you prefer. Once you book, you'll receive an email with all the details.
contact.faq4_a: I send you a detailed quote with the recommended services for your project. No pressure to sign up.

portfolio.label: Our Work
portfolio.title: Projects that speak for themselves.
portfolio.desc: Each project reflects my philosophy: design with purpose, strategy with results.
portfolio.empty_desc: We're preparing amazing projects for this category. Check back soon!
portfolio.final_cta: Like this work? We can create something amazing together.
